page_label: Embedded boundary toolkit: owner/origin chrome, browser handoff, native approval fences, and support export

rows.data_boundary_label: Local signed docs snapshot bundled with this build.
rows.source_version_freshness_label: Docs/help source is Local signed docs snapshot bundled with this build.; version and freshness are represented by Live verified.
rows.plain_language_summary: Project docs rendered from the local signed pack. Open-in-browser routes through a host-owned handoff and does not grant embedded approval authority.

rows.data_boundary_label: Cross-origin subframe inside the Acme Cloud extension panel.
rows.source_version_freshness_label: Extension publisher surface from Acme Cloud, Inc.; state Cross-origin limited.
rows.plain_language_summary: The extension panel can render the Acme status page, but Aureline cannot read its DOM or storage. Open in browser preserves the status-page object identity.

rows.source_version_freshness_label: Marketplace/account scope Tenant acme-prod / install and billing read; provider health expired.
rows.network_or_offline_posture_label: Stale snapshot via provider health expired; fallback system_browser_first.
rows.provider_scope_label: Tenant acme-prod / install and billing read
rows.plain_language_summary: This account page is showing a stale in-product snapshot. Renew in the browser before protected install, grant, or billing actions.

rows.data_boundary_label: Hosted dashboard. Embedded render disabled by managed-workspace policy.
rows.source_version_freshness_label: Service dashboard scope Cluster payments-prod; provider health suspended.
rows.network_or_offline_posture_label: Policy blocked (in-product render disabled) via provider health suspended; fallback external_open_blocked_by_policy.
rows.plain_language_summary: Managed policy prevents Aureline from rendering this dashboard in-product. The card preserves owner, origin, and provider scope and routes recovery into the host-native review surface.

rows.data_boundary_label: System browser session, returned to Aureline desktop.
rows.source_version_freshness_label: Auth handoff for github.com; flow system_browser.
rows.plain_language_summary: Sign in opens in your system browser. Aureline waits for the return packet; nothing is typed inside this card. Device-code is the auditable fallback if the browser cannot return.
